summary: **feat(web)**: hide admin menu from plain users, fix breadcrumbs, add env badge — Sidebar checkAdmin

changes.text: **feat(web)**: hide admin menu from plain users, fix breadcrumbs, add env badge — Sidebar checkAdminAuth now defaults-deny on allowOwner/allowAdmin items without requiredRole; /my-tasks breadcrumb resolved; TopBar shows TEST/DEV badge when hostname ≠ icosys.app (f418263)

summary: **fix(auth)**: accept SSO users on /me and account-switch — SsoAuthService now idempotently links SS

changes.text: **fix(auth)**: accept SSO users on /me and account-switch — SsoAuthService now idempotently links SSO users to default account/group on every login; UserAuthService.buildMeResponse + switchAccount branch on identityRef for SSO users; UserProcessService ensureAccountLink/ensureGroupMembership no longer trigger DuplicateKeyException (1850bd6)

summary: superadmin tenant-settings rewrite — list of all tenants, account selector on create, readonly accou

changes.text: superadmin tenant-settings rewrite — list of all tenants, account selector on create, readonly account name on edit
E2E quality gates — toast raw-key guard (MutationObserver) + form-submit smoke spec covering every CRUD /new route
prefer backend localized userMessage over generic IC-* code description so specific validation errors no longer show as "Doğrulama hatası"
defensive account error i18n (error.account.name_* / default_already_exists / cannot_delete_default)
break SSO auto-login loop — email only persisted after a completed callback, not on discovery
SSO test connection uses dedicated POST endpoint
account.defaultStatus no longer defaults to true on CREATE (was firing single-default validation on every new account)

summary: always accept safe image types (jpg/jpeg/png/webp/gif) for platform features (profile photos, tenant

changes.text: always accept safe image types (jpg/jpeg/png/webp/gif) for platform features (profile photos, tenant logos, inline images) regardless of per-tenant whitelist
super admin can now manage files cross-tenant (skipTenantFilterForSuperAdmin) for tenant-settings logo assignment
add ONEDRIVE to chk_provider_type CHECK constraint (V2026_04_18 migration)

summary: enrich tenant-settings DTO with account identity (accountNo/accountName via CrProcess chain)

changes.text: enrich tenant-settings DTO with account identity (accountNo/accountName via CrProcess chain)
derive AutoCodeConfig.moduleCode from provider registry so frontend single-choice form no longer fails NOT NULL

summary: skip SSO discovery for broken OIDC/SAML config (ac43e4b) — fixes infinite /login loop when SSO misco

changes.text: skip SSO discovery for broken OIDC/SAML config (ac43e4b) — fixes infinite /login loop when SSO misconfigured

summary: show ACTION_BUTTON in CREATE mode with save-first hint (b06e579)

changes.text: show ACTION_BUTTON in CREATE mode with save-first hint (b06e579)
skip validation for fields in hidden sections (d678ea1)

summary: nginx SPA fallback now returns `index.html` for routes whose path collides with a shipped static ass

changes.text: nginx SPA fallback now returns `index.html` for routes whose path collides with a shipped static asset subdirectory (e.g. `/help/`, which returned 403 because `help/screenshots/` exists). (#help-403)
